name: Demo: Rx Demo K3s Deploy
description: Apply the rx-demo k3s-demo overlay, deploy the app plus in-cluster Grafana/Prometheus/Loki/Tempo instrumentation, wait for rollout, and prove the Kubernetes path matches the Docker Compose app outcome.
notes: Demo lane for the registry-based k3s deployment. Current recording path uses k8s/overlays/k3s-demo with image tag 097889a and NodePorts rx-ui=30080, api=30081, grafana=30300, prometheus=30090, loki=30100, tempo=30200.
